analysis.name: Raydium
analysis.summary: RAY近期无明显上涨，24h下跌1.2%，7天下跌2.5%。基本面稳健，但缺乏短期催化剂。近期有安全事件（6月10日漏洞损失134万美元）和竞争压力（Pump.fun等）。建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现重大利好（如TVL大幅增长、新合作）或价格放量突破阻力位，可重新评估。

catalysts: Solana生态持续发展，Raydium作为头部DEX受益
LaunchLab等新产品可能吸引用户
永续合约上线增加收入来源

latestNews.reason: 安全事件损害信任，但金额相对较小

latestNews.title: Raydium LaunchLab: How RAY is Revolutionizing Token Creation on Solana
latestNews.reason: 新产品可能吸引用户和交易量

fundamentals: Solana上领先的AMM和DEX，与Serum深度集成
代币总供应量5.55亿，流通约2.69亿，流通率48.5%
24小时交易量826万美元，流动性充足
历史最高价16.83美元，当前跌幅96%
marketRead: 7天和30天均为下跌趋势，缺乏上涨动能
DEX对RAY/JUP流动性3842万美元，但交易量仅7560美元，流动性深度好但交易不活跃
risks: 近期安全漏洞事件可能影响用户信心
竞争加剧：Pump.fun等新平台分流用户
代币解锁压力：总供应量仍有51.5%未流通
市场整体情绪偏弱，DeFi板块表现一般
sourceNotes: 价格数据来自CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News聚合
部分新闻日期较早，时效性不足
DEX交易对为RAY/JUP，非主流稳定币对，价格可能失真

profile.name: Raydium
profile.description: Raydium is an automated market maker (AMM) and liquidity provider built on the Solana blockchain for the Serum decentralized exchange (DEX). Raydium has a first-mover advantage as an AMM within Serum and will be an integral part of bringing new and existing projects and protocols into the ecosystem. The protocol will act as a bridge for projects looking to expand to Solana and Serum, and in the process Raydium and the RAY token will become a foundation for enabling further development with partners, its own platform, and the ecosystem as a whole. Unlike any other AMMs, Raydium provides on-chain liquidity to a central limit orderbook, meaning that Raydium LPs get access to the entire orderflow and liquidity of Serum. Long term, Raydium aims to capture and maintain a leadership position among AMMs and liquidity providers on Serum, while leveraging the power of Solana to drive the evolution of decentralized finance (DeFi) and emerge as a leading protocol in the space alongside our partners and the community."
